# @json-express/email-console — AI Context

Development email provider: "sends" email by logging it to the console in a readable block (tokens/links are grep-able in server output).

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/email-console
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import or register it.**

## Configuration (.env)
| Key | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.email.from` | `no-reply@localhost` | Default From address |

## What it unlocks
- `ctx.email.send({ to, subject, text | html })` inside model hooks and custom endpoints.
- Enables `plugin-identity`'s email verification and password-reset flows in development.
- Swap for a real SMTP/provider package in production — same `ctx.email` surface.
